results.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Gifts IShowSpeed Limited Edition Game-Worn FIFA World Cup Cleats in Video
results.description: Portugal star Cristiano Ronaldo gifted streamer IShowSpeed a pair of game-worn cleats from his run at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

results.title: Spain secure dramatic World Cup victory over Belgium after dreadful error from Senne Lammens gifts Mikel Merino late winner
results.description: DANIEL MATTHEWS IN LOS ANGELES: With this quarterfinal hanging in the balance, Courtois gave way for Senne Lammens. What a disaster this was for the Manchester United goalkeeper.

results.title: Spain secure dramatic World Cup win over Belgium after costly blunder
